notableMoments: First World Cup appearance in 1938, lost 2-1 to Italy in extra time
56-year gap between first (1938) and second (1994) World Cup appearances
Beat Brazil 2-1 in the 1998 group stage - one of Norway's greatest results
Reached the Round of 16 in 1998 before losing to Italy
Returning to the World Cup in 2026 after a 28-year absence
Erling Haaland making his World Cup debut in 2026
